title: citropsis articulata
intro: Citropsis articulata, also known as the West African orange, is a species of plant in the family Rutaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Citropsis articulata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
